channel.title: New York City Daily Weather
channel.description: A daily weather report for New York City
channel.itunes:author: The Weather Report Podcast Company

item.title: NYC Weather Report - Sunday, May 3, 2026
item.description: This is your New York City Weather Report for Sunday, May 3, 2026. Before we get to the forecast, there are some important weather alerts for the Manhattan area. A Moderate Special Weather Statement is in effect. Special Weather Statement issued May 3 at 1:31PM EDT by NWS Upton NY. A Moderate Spe...

item.title: NYC Weather Report - Thursday, April 30, 2026
item.description: This is your New York City Weather Report for Thursday, April 30, 2026. Here is today's forecast for New York City. The current temperature in Manhattan is 48 degrees. We're heading to a high of 64 degrees today, with an overnight low of 48 degrees. Winds are a light breeze at 8 miles per hour. I...

item.title: NYC Weather Report - Tuesday, April 28, 2026
item.description: This is your New York City Weather Report for Tuesday, April 28, 2026. Here is today's forecast for New York City. The current temperature in Manhattan is 58 degrees. We're heading to a high of 65 degrees today, with an overnight low of 50 degrees. Winds are a light breeze at 10 miles per hour. I...

item.title: NYC Weather Report - Monday, April 27, 2026
item.description: Today in Manhattan: 66 degrees current, high of 66, overnight low of 47. Winds are a light breeze at 9 miles per hour. Looking ahead to Tuesday: high of 65, low of 49.

item.title: NYC Weather Report - Tuesday, April 21, 2026
item.description: Today in Manhattan: 39 degrees current, sunny with a high near 53, overnight low of 44. Light breeze. Looking ahead to Wednesday: showers likely, high near 58, low around 49.

item.title: NYC Weather Report - Monday, April 20, 2026
item.description: Today in Manhattan: 50 degrees current, high of 52, overnight low of 35. 20% chance of showers, breezy. Looking ahead to Tuesday: sunny with a high near 54.
